title: brachypodium distachyon subsp. paui
intro: Brachypodium distachyon subsp. paui, also known as a wild grass native to the Iberian Peninsula, is a plant species within the Poaceae family. It possesses potential medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may contribute to its health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, such as gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Brachypodium distachyon subsp. paui, including infusions and decoctions, are used in traditional medicine to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
